readelf -d /usr/local/lib/python3.10/dist-packages/sgl_kernel/ops/warp_reduce_cuda.*.so | grep RPATH

sglang.title: Rename rust folder to sgl-router

Motivation
Rename rust folder to sgl-router to be consistent with other sub packages.

Modifications

vllm.title: [Hardware][Intel-Gaudi] Enable LoRA support for Intel Gaudi (HPU)
vllm.author: scsudhak-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR enables support for LoRA on Intel Gaudi by adding HPU specific kernels in PunicaWrapperHPU to handle LoRA computations more efficiently on the hardware.

vllm.title: [Misc][LoRA] Ensure Lora Adapter requests return adapter name
vllm.author: Jeffwan

vllm.title: [V1] Fix torch profiling for offline inference
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Tested with VLLM_USE_V1=1 python3 examples/offline_inference_with_profiler.py. Without this fix, running the same script will error out with
RuntimeWarning: coroutine 'InprocClient.profile' was never awaited

Edit:
Also fixed for VLLM_USE_V1=1 VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING=1 python3 examples/offlin

vllm.title: fix(docs): typo in helm install instructions
vllm.author: ramonziai

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Quick fix to make Pixtral-HF load correctly again after 39e227c7ae.
vllm.author: sjuxax
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After 39e227c, I was unable to start my Pixtral-HF model due to this traceback
Traceback
INFO 12-09 08:47:15 model_runner.py:1094] Loading model weights took 8.2663 GB
ERROR 12-09 08:47:16 engine.py:366] vllm.multimodal.inputs.MultiModalKwargs() got multiple values for keyword argument 'is_pixtral'

vllm.title: [Misc] Validate grammar and fail early
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt: If the grammar is invalid, we now let xGrammar throw RuntimeError when compiling it. However, this happens in logits processor, so the exception is raised from model executor. Since we don't expect model executor to throw any exception now, the exception will crash the engine and kill the worker pro

vllm.title: Fix logging of the vLLM Config
vllm.author: JArnoldAMD
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The llm_engine logs its VllmConfig during initialization.  A recent change to the logging (#10999) has resulted in this log entry containing python object references rather than the actual details of the config, e.g.:
VllmConfig(model_config=<vllm.config.ModelConfig object at 0x7f123b55db50>, cache_

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix value unpack error of simple connector for KVCache transfer.
vllm.author: ShangmingCai
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently the send_kv_caches_and_hidden_states get the value of num_heads and head_size from kv_cache[0].shape, which will raise ValueError when the KVCache is compacted. Since we have model_executable as the function input, we can directly get these values from the model config to avoid this error.

vllm.title: [Misc][V1] Fix type in v1 prefix caching
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the type error reported by #11105
cc @WoosukKwon @markmc

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Dynamic fp8 + rms_norm fusion
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds support for RMSNorm + (fp8) quant fusion. It also refactors the fusion pass to make it easier to add patterns. That includes support for multiple values of epsilon.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use runner_type instead of task in GritLM
vllm.author: pooyadavoodi
vllm.bodyExcerpt: While the GritLM PR #10816 was merged, #10820 added new type of pooling tasks to vllm. Since GritLM pooling logic relied on the task type, the tests started to fail. This PR is now using runner_type instead of task in the pooling logic.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Update starcoder2 to remap k/v scale names for kv_cache quantization
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

In response to the following bug: vllm-project/llm-compressor#967
Update to remap the k/v scale names so that they can be loaded post kv cache quantization

vllm.title: [ROCm][AMD] Disable auto enabling chunked prefill on ROCm
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
On ROCm platform chunked prefill is showing poor performance dueto a suboptimal triton kernel.
Therefore it's better to have to enable it explicitly until the performance issue is resolved rather than automatically

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Fix 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'hash_value'
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Exposed by #11151.
This bug has no impact on correctness nor performance.
Tested locally and benchmark serving can be done without errors.
cc @robertgshaw2-neuralmagic @WoosukKwon

vllm.title: [core] clean up cudagraph batchsize padding logic
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
unify the logic of cudagraph batchsize padding, and allow user-specified cudagraph capture sizes.
users might want to customize cudagraph capture sizes to accelerate start time, while only capture cudagraph for certain sizes they care about.
